base_size.note: Varies by effect type - particles are 2-4px, speech bubble is 12x10px

shared_attributes.layer: foreground (on top of all other elements)

context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet game where player cares for Echo the cockatiel
context.role: Visual indicator that Echo is singing, appears during singing state
context.screen_position: Spawns to right of Echo at x=75-85px, y=35-45px, floats upward
context.usage_scenario: 3 music notes spawn during echo_singing animation at frames 2, 4, 6. Each note floats upward 10-15px over 1 second while fading. Indicates Echo is performing cockatiel whistle song.

visual_specification.shape: Musical eighth note (♪) symbol. 3px wide, 5px tall. Round note head (2x2px) at bottom, vertical stem (1px wide, 3px tall) extending upward.

animation.description: Frame 1: Note appears at spawn position. Frame 2: Moves up 4px. Frame 3: Moves up 4px, begins fade (75% opacity). Frame 4: Moves up 4px, fades to 25% then disappears. Total vertical movement: 12px upward. Duration: 1 second.

visual_specification.details: Note shape: 3x5px in #FFEC27. Note head: 2x2px circle at bottom. Stem: 1px wide, 3px tall vertical line. Spawns at x=78±5px (random offset), y=40px. Floats to y=28px. 3 notes spawn per singing animation with 0.5 second intervals.

relationships.shared_with: Same yellow color (#FFEC27) as Echo's crest
relationships.differences_from: Unlike hearts: music note shape, spawns during singing (not petting), yellow color. Unlike ZZZ: upward movement (not diagonal), different shape.
